summary: Mission v13.4 - Refactoring Final & Pre-Deployment VALIDATED. Backend 100% (18/18 tests), Frontend validated. Anti-regression: 22 reservations, 7 contacts confirmed. All 6 extracted components working.

minor.issue: Fixed: stripe_routes.py was not included in FastAPI app router. Also fixed async/await MongoDB calls.

issues: Video shows clapper-board fallback icon when heroImageUrl (YouTube URL) fails to load. This is expected behavior - just a media loading placeholder.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ CoachDashboard.js successfully reduced to 5432 lines (from 6537 - reduction of 1105 lines)
✅ 6 components extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/: ConceptEditor, CoursesManager, OffersManager, CreditsGate, CreditBoutique, StripeConnectTab
✅ stripe_routes.py extracted but was NOT included in server.py - FIXED by adding fastapi_app.include_router(stripe_router) and init_stripe_db(db)
✅ stripe_routes.py had synchronous MongoDB calls but db is async Motor - FIXED all find_one/update_one/insert_one to use await
✅ All extracted components pass ESLint with 0 errors
✅ All data-testid attributes properly preserved for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v13.4 validated. CoachDashboard.js reduced from 6537 to 5432 lines (-1105 lines, 16.9% reduction). 6 components extracted to /components/dashboard/. IMPORTANT FIX: stripe_routes.py was imported but NOT added to FastAPI app - fixed by adding include_router. Also converted all MongoDB calls to async. Anti-regression: 22 reservations (confirmed with Super Admin header), 7 contacts. Réserver button scrolls to sessions. Video area shows placeholder when YouTube URL doesn't embed.

stripe_routes_fix.issue: Router was imported but not added to FastAPI app
stripe_routes_fix.solution: Added fastapi_app.include_router(stripe_router) and init_stripe_db(db) at line 6765
stripe_routes_fix.async_fix: Converted all db.*.find_one() and db.*.update_one() to use await

reservations_count.note: Requires X-User-Email header with Super Admin email to access

video_fullwidth.note: Video uses YouTube URL in heroImageUrl - shows placeholder when embed fails
